headline: S&P 500 at critical crossroads
detail: The article warns a breakdown from current levels could signal further losses ahead. With your book 90% in tech and on margin, a broad market leg lower amplifies drawdowns across PLTR, AVGO, CRWD, and your SpaceX names simultaneously. This is the single biggest macro risk to your entire portfolio right now.

headline: Fed split on inflation — Goolsbee vs. Williams
detail: Goolsbee saying inflation is too high pushes back on rate-cut expectations, which compresses valuations on high-multiple tech and chip names like PLTR and AVGO. Conflicting Fed voices mean more uncertainty and likely more volatility for exactly the names you hold. On margin, volatility is not your friend.

headline: SpaceX stock called a terrible buy
detail: This headline directly concerns your two SpaceX positions, SPCX and SPAL. Negative sentiment on a brand-new IPO with limited data can move price quickly and hard. SPAL is a 2x leveraged product — bad press on the underlying accelerates losses and decay; your $19 stop on SPAL deserves a close look today.

headline: ON Semiconductor acquires Synaptics for $7B in AI push
detail: A major chip-sector deal signals continued consolidation in physical AI hardware. This is broadly relevant to your chip exposure via AVGO and SMH. M&A activity can lift sector sentiment, but it does not offset the specific technical weakness already flagged in AVGO.
